title: critic_result.json -- blind draft review findings v0.2
description: Produced by critic, on every draft report version (draft_report_v1.md in Phase 1, draft_report_v2.md in Phase 2). Structurally never reads ground truth -- see critic.md.

reviewed_document.description: Path to the draft version reviewed. e.g. outputs/CASE_003/draft_report_v1.md

passed.description: Explicit rollup, not inferred from findings.length -- lets critic mark passed:false on a severity judgment call even alongside minor-only findings.

orphaned_tag_count.description: [E#] tags in the document with no matching .evidence.json sidecar entry.

unused_citation_count.description: Sidecar entries never referenced by a tag in the document.

forbidden_literal_hit_count.description: Count of listed literal forbidden phrases found in the draft by dao.py check-forbidden-expressions. Optional/additive (deliberately NOT in required) -- critic outputs written before 2026-07-18 legitimately omit it. Floor only: the listed literal phrases, not the semantic P3 pass.
